prose.en: FedRAMP MUST periodically review FedRAMP Incident Evaluation and Communication implementation with providers based on lack of reporting or other information.

en: FedRAMP will request a Corrective Action Plan when a provider is unaware of the rules or has failed to implement proper procedures.
FedRAMP will grant a 3 month grace period to implement proper procedures pending remediation and possible revocation of FedRAMP Certification.
